candidates.name: Aarav Sen
candidates.resumeText:
AARAV SEN
AI/ML ENGINEER & FULLSTACK DEVELOPER

Experience:
- 3+ years experience building machine learning models in Python.
- Handled deployments of custom PyTorch LLMs on AWS EC2.
- Developed responsive frontend apps using React.js and Next.js.

Skills: Python, TensorFlow, PyTorch, React, Node.js, Git, SQL, Docker, AWS.
candidates.evaluationText: Excellent candidate with balanced skills in both AI modeling (PyTorch) and Next.js frontend development. Solid fit for the Fullstack + AI role.

interviewTranscript.text: Hi Aarav! Welcome to the candidate screening interview. Can you tell us about your experience with AI models and React?
Hi! I have worked for 3 years building predictive models and fine-tuning BERT and PyTorch architectures. I also build clean dashboard layouts in React to display model predictions to business teams.
That sounds impressive. How do you handle database connections and scaling when dealing with real-time predictions?
I write optimized PostgreSQL queries, implement indexes on search keys, and cache heavy AI model outputs using Redis to keep response times low.
Thank you Aarav, we will be in touch.

customQuestions: Can you elaborate on PyTorch scaling?
Describe a challenging Next.js component you built.

candidates.name: Priya Das
candidates.resumeText:
PRIYA DAS
SENIOR TALENT ACQUISITION & HR COORDINATOR

Experience:
- Managed onboarding of 300+ staff members.
- Handled conflict resolution, payroll processing, and HR compliance audits.
- Recruiter for tech positions, specializing in software engineering positions.

Skills: HRIS, Recruiting, Employment Law, Employee Engagement, Excel.
candidates.evaluationText: Candidate is highly experienced in standard HR and Recruitment operations, but lacks any programming, AI/ML, or engineering background required for this technical role.

interviewTranscript.text: Hello Priya. Can you describe your experience in the AI/ML domain and Fullstack web development?
Hello. I do not write code directly. However, I have recruited AI/ML developers, handled HR compliance, and managed team onboarding. I have a deep understanding of corporate culture.
